Added_Camera/UI.name: DFFlagFixSpawnCameraLookingDown
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Changes the default camera angle when players spawn to a more neutral position.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Enhances the player experience by preventing disorientation upon entering the game.

Added_Camera/UI.name: FFlagAddOriginalGuidAttributeOnScriptClone2
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Adds a unique identifier attribute to cloned scripts for tracking purposes.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Helps developers identify and manage script instances better, reducing bugs and improving game stability.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAcousticSimulationPathfindingManhattanHeuristic
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a new method for calculating paths based on sound simulation.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances NPC navigation and interaction with sound in the game environment.

Added_Other.name: FFlagOCNewTelem
Added_Other.mechanism: Introduces new telemetry features for tracking game events.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides developers with improved tools to monitor player interactions and game performance.

Added_Other.name: FFlagPreventRenamingFiberRunners
Added_Other.mechanism: Stops the renaming of certain internal processes in the game engine.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother performance and stability by keeping critical components unchanged.

Added_Other.name: FFlagProcessDarwinWorkerSetQosClass
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets the Quality of Service (QoS) class for worker processes on Darwin systems.

Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by allowing developers to optimize for different devices.

Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reliability of sound simulations in games.

Added_Other.name: FIntAcousticSimulationPathCacheMaxRetries_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many times the system tries to calculate sound paths.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances audio quality in games by ensuring sound behaves realistically without excessive delays.
